title: Austin move plan — June 9-11 scouting, Cam-on-fence, $1100 budget, surface-area-of-luck
html:
Austin move plan — June 9-11 scouting, Cam-on-fence, $1100 budget, surface-area-of-luck

Source: 2025-05-21 Google Doc. The strategic-planning doc for the Austin move — written 7 months after the "Cam Jipp partner in crime" inflection and 3 months before the actual departure. Lays out the reasoning + critical-path questions.

TL;DR

  • Tab 1 — the why and the strategic gut-check:
    • Trip June 9-11 to scout apartments IRL.
    • Why Austin: "To increase our surface area of luck. For business, for women, for our life fulfillment. It seems like the right place to be at the moment."
    • The Cam problem: "cam is still on the fence about moving and he doesnt really think in reality. He thinks that he can just come for a few months and if things do go right or whatever he can just move back, but there are commitments like leases involved... The thing, literally the only thing holding him back, is his gf of 1 year. He not even fully convinced that he wants to marry this girl."
    • The income strategy: "I dont really want or plan on having a job in austin, i mainly want to have a like a part time personal training job to cover bills, but I want to build i want to work for myself." (This becomes the NaviWell Health Coach role.)
    • Budget: $1,100/month rent for 2 people.
    • The thesis: "I want to build ideas to reality. Enjoy the process. Become rich and compound the wealth. Be in the gutters until we claw our way out. Is there a chance its miserable, maybe. Does it sound lit yes."
  • Tab 2 — the AI-generated critical-questions checklist:
    • 7 critical questions (roommate commitment, income proof 2.5-3× rent, apartment type, lease overlap, backup if Cam bails, income strategy in Austin, paperwork).
    • Timeline: April 16-30 = finalize Cam + docs; May 1-15 = research listings; May 16-31 = narrow + confirm Cam in writing; June 1-8 = applications; June 9-11 = tours + on-the-spot apply; June 12-20 = approval + lease + deposit; Late Aug / Early Sept = move in.

Pattern observed

This is the operational midpoint between the Oct 2024 inflection and the Sept 2025 arrival. Yahir lays out the surface-area-of-luck thesis explicitly — the philosophical justification for moving to a higher-density opportunity zone. Same logic underpins Brotein (build to ship vs build to dream) and eventually Rankett (find a niche where AI agencies are looking and be the technical layer).

The Cam-on-fence framing in May is prophetic — by the September arrival doc, Yahir is alone in Austin and resentful that Cam hasn't shown up. The May concerns ("the only thing holding him back is his gf") become September fact ("I hold slight resentment for him not being here"). And by August's IRL Lore Tab 7 the friendship-business critique sharpens to "result-driven not mission-driven."

Key quote

"Be in the gutters until we claw our way out."

Open questions

  • Did Cam ever sign the lease? (Per 2025 09 20 on austin: no — Yahir went alone.)
  • Was the $1,100/mo budget actually achievable? (Per 2025 09 23 how im scraping by: barely — overnight gym shifts as bridge income.)
  • The "part time personal training" income plan — became NaviWell instead.
